VideoHero.srSuffix: TVDE fleet management software in Portugal.
VideoHero.lead: Prisma Fleet is the software that replaces spreadsheets, eliminates calculation errors, and gives your drivers a portal with their statement.

Hero.factA: Built for TVDE operators in Portugal
Hero.factC: Imports for Uber, Bolt, Via Verde and Prio
Hero.propImportDesc: Drop in Uber, Bolt, Via Verde and Prio files. The rest is automatic.
Hero.propZeroErrDesc: Fixed rent or revenue share. Every deduction applied without fail.
Hero.propPortalDesc: Every driver sees their own statement. No phone calls, no confusion.

ProofStrip.label: Built for the real day-to-day of TVDE operators in Portugal

IntegrationStrip.label: Integrates with the platforms you already use
IntegrationStrip.openSite: Open {name} website in a new tab

Pain.lead: Operators lose hours every week on tasks that should be automatic. And the errors get expensive.
Pain.card1Desc: Copying data, calculating deductions, double-checking values. Every week, the same manual routine.
Pain.card2Desc: Broken formulas, swapped rows, fuel forgotten. Mistakes that cost real money.
Pain.card3Desc: Drivers call asking how much they will be paid. No portal, no transparency.

Features.titleB: run your fleet end to end
Features.lead: From import to payment, a complete platform for TVDE operators. No Excel, no errors, no stress.
Features.card1Desc: Import earnings, apply rent, fuel, Via Verde and deductions. The calculation is instant. Fixed rent or revenue share.
Features.card2Desc: Drop in CSV or XLSX files. The parser detects columns automatically and maps everything to the right driver.
Features.card3Desc: Every driver gets their own portal. They see earnings, deductions and the final amount. No phone calls.
Features.card4Desc: Total revenue, active vehicles, occupancy rate and per-driver performance. All in one place.
Features.extra1Desc: Generate SEPA XML files ready for the bank.
Features.extra3Desc: Run up to 5 companies from a single account.
Features.extra4Desc: Manage leads and follow up with prospective drivers.

Workflow.lead: A simple workflow that replaces hours of manual work. Every week, without fail.
Workflow.step1Desc: Drop the Uber, Bolt, Via Verde and Prio files into the platform.
Workflow.step2Desc: The system generates settlements automatically with every deduction.
Workflow.step3Desc: Review the figures, adjust whatever you need, and approve each settlement.
Workflow.step4Desc: Generate the SEPA file, send it to the bank and mark it as paid.

Pricing.titleB: for the stage of your fleet
Pricing.starterDesc: For operators with up to 30 vehicles who want to leave Excel behind.
Pricing.proDesc: For growing operators who need full control.
Pricing.enterpriseDesc: For large operators who need dedicated infrastructure.

items.a: If you are a TVDE operator in Portugal renting cars to Uber or Bolt drivers, yes. Prisma Fleet was built specifically for you, whether you run 5 or 300 vehicles.

items.q: Can I try it without paying?
items.a: Yes. Every plan includes a 14-day free trial, no credit card required. Import your real data and test everything before you decide.
Export the CSV files from Uber and Bolt and the XLSX files from Via Verde and Prio. Drop them into the platform and the parser maps everything to the right drivers automatically.

items.q: Do you support fixed rent and revenue share?
items.a: Yes. Each driver-vehicle assignment can have its own compensation model. You can mix fixed rent and revenue share within the same fleet.

items.q: Can my drivers see their settlements?
items.a: Yes. Every driver gets portal access where they see earnings, deductions and the final amount for each week. It works on any phone.

items.q: What if I have multiple companies?
items.a: Prisma Fleet supports multi-company. Run up to 5 legal entities inside the same account, with quick switching between them.
Each operator runs on their own isolated instance with a dedicated database. One client's data is never mixed with another's.

items.q: Can I cancel at any time?
items.a: Yes. No lock-in contracts. Cancel whenever you want and keep access until the end of the paid period.

CTA.titleB: and close every week with control
CTA.lead: Try Prisma Fleet for 14 days, no commitment. No credit card, no hassle.

DemoPage.lead: Fill in the form and we will schedule a personalised demo for your operation. No commitment, no credit card.
DemoPage.benefit1Desc: The team will get back to you the next business day.
DemoPage.benefit2Desc: We walk through the platform with data tailored to the size of your fleet.
DemoPage.benefit3Desc: After the demo, try it with your real data for two weeks.

DemoForm.sent: Request sent. We will be in touch shortly.

CookieBanner.title: Your privacy
CookieBanner.body: We use cookies to make the site work and, with your permission, to understand how it is used and improve the experience. You can accept all, reject what is not essential, or customise your choices.
CookieBanner.essentialDesc: Required for the site to work: session, saved consent and demo form submission. They cannot be disabled.
CookieBanner.analyticsDesc: We use PostHog (hosted in the EU) to collect aggregated stats: page views, traffic sources, button clicks and anonymous sessions. It helps us understand what works and improve the product.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.p1a: Prisma Solutions, a legal entity headquartered in Portugal, is responsible for processing the personal data collected through the prismafleet.pt website and the Prisma Fleet platform.
Privacy.p2: We collect the following personal data:
Privacy.list2aDesc: name, email and phone number provided in the contact or demo form.
Privacy.list2bDesc: technical information about your visit to the website, including IP address, browser type and pages viewed.
Privacy.list2cDesc: fleet, driver and settlement data entered into the platform by registered users.
Privacy.p3: Personal data is processed for the following purposes:
Privacy.list3a: Respond to contact and demo requests.
Privacy.list3b: Provide the services contracted on the Prisma Fleet platform.
Privacy.list3c: Send communications related to the service.
Privacy.list3d: Improve the user experience of the website and platform.
Privacy.p4: Processing of personal data is based on the data subject's consent, the performance of a contract or pre-contract, and compliance with legal obligations, as applicable.
Privacy.p5: Personal data is not sold or shared with third parties for marketing purposes. We may share data with service providers necessary for the operation of the platform (hosting, payment processing), subject to confidentiality obligations.
Privacy.p6: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect personal data against unauthorised access, loss or destruction. Each operator runs on an isolated instance with a dedicated database.
Privacy.p7: Personal data is retained only for the period necessary for the purposes for which it was collected or as required by law.
Privacy.p8: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to:
Privacy.list8d: Object to the processing of your data.
Privacy.list8f: Lodge a complaint with the Portuguese Data Protection Authority (CNPD).
Privacy.p8b: To exercise your rights, contact us at
Privacy.p9: This website does not use tracking or advertising cookies. Strictly necessary cookies for the operation of the website may be used.
Privacy.p10: We reserve the right to update this policy at any time. Changes take effect on the date of their publication on this page.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.p1: These terms govern access to and use of the Prisma Fleet platform, provided by Prisma Solutions, intended for TVDE operators in Portugal for fleet, settlement and driver management.
Terms.p2: By accessing the prismafleet.pt website or using the Prisma Fleet platform, the user fully accepts these terms. If you do not agree, you must stop using the service.
Terms.p3: Prisma Fleet provides the following features:
Terms.list3a: Imports of files from mobility platforms (Uber, Bolt).
Terms.list3c: Management of compensation models (fixed rent and revenue share).
Terms.p4: Access to the platform requires account registration. The user is responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their credentials and for all activities carried out on their account.
Terms.p5: The platform is available in different subscription plans. Every plan includes a 14-day free trial period, with no credit card required. Pricing and conditions for each plan are available on the pricing page.
Terms.p6: After the trial period, the user must subscribe to a paid plan to continue using the platform. Billing is monthly and processed automatically.
Terms.p7: The user may cancel their subscription at any time, without penalty. Access to the platform remains available until the end of the current billing period.
Terms.p8: All content, trademarks, logos and software of Prisma Fleet are the property of Prisma Solutions and protected by applicable law. The user does not acquire any intellectual property rights through the use of the platform.
Terms.p9a: The processing of personal data is governed by our
Terms.p9b: . Each operator runs on an isolated instance, ensuring complete separation of data between clients.
Terms.p10: We strive to ensure continuous availability of the platform but do not guarantee that the service will be available without interruption or free of errors. We may carry out scheduled maintenance with prior notice.
Terms.p11: Prisma Fleet is provided as is. Prisma Solutions is not liable for indirect damages, including loss of revenue, data or profits, arising from the use or inability to use the platform.
Terms.p12: We reserve the right to amend these terms. Any changes will be communicated to registered users and take effect on the date of their publication.
Terms.p13: These terms are governed by Portuguese law. The court of the district of Prisma Solutions' registered office shall be competent for any dispute resolution.
Terms.p14: For any questions about these terms, contact us at
